file_coverage.modules/crypto/verify.cs: 100% (line coverage — but null Hash branch uncovered, see finding 1)
file_coverage.modules/identity/types.cs: 92% — Deserialize direct-cast path + null fallback never hit; GetOrCreateDefaultAsync save-failure paths never hit; LoadAllAsync error path never hit

findings.issue: Verify.Run() catches FormatException from Convert.FromHexString(Hash) but Hash=null throws ArgumentNullException, which is unhandled. Line coverage shows 100% because the line IS hit — but the null exception branch is invisible to line coverage. This is a code bug, not just a test gap.
findings.impact: If a .pr file or source generator passes null Hash, Verify throws instead of returning Data.FromError(). Violates 'behavior methods never throw' contract.
findings.suggestion: Add null guard for Hash (same as the Data null check on line 18-19). Add test with Hash = null!.

findings.issue: GetOrCreateDefaultAsync has two throw paths (lines 84, 101) for save failures that are never exercised. These are defensive throws that propagate up to catch blocks in export.cs:32, get.cs:33, and IdentityData.cs:56 — all also untested.
findings.impact: If DataSource.Save fails during auto-create or promotion, the entire exception chain is untested: types.cs throws → export/get catch → return ServiceError. A bug in any of these would go undetected.
findings.suggestion: Mock DataSource to return a failed save result and verify the full chain: throw in types.cs → catch in handler → Data.FromError with 'SaveError' key

findings.issue: LoadAllAsync error path (line 55) and Deserialize null fallback (line 143) never hit. LoadAllAsync returns empty list when DataSource fails; Deserialize returns null for non-dictionary/non-IdentityVariable values.
findings.impact: Low — defensive code for unlikely DataSource corruption
findings.suggestion: Informational. These are edge cases for data corruption scenarios.

findings.issue: 6 PLang .goal tests exist but cannot be built or run — crypto module not registered with builder yet
findings.impact: Full pipeline validation deferred until builder integration
findings.suggestion: Build and run PLang tests after crypto module is registered with the builder

summary: Coverage is now properly measured (previous crash was due to wrong output path). Crypto source files are 100% line coverage — but line coverage is misleading on verify.cs where 100% hides an unhandled null branch (ArgumentNullException vs FormatException). Identity module has untested save-failure chains at 82-92% coverage. 1 major finding (verify null Hash bug), 3 minor. All v1 findings resolved.
